subject: refactor(ui): replace 16 independent themes with 2 combo presets (Mono/Luxe)
body:
Simplify DaisyUI theme selection from 16 independently selectable themes
(8 light + 8 dark) to 2 curated combos: Mono (lofi/black) and Luxe
(fantasy/luxury). Users pick a combo; dark/light toggle switches between
the paired themes. Reduces cognitive load from 16 choices to 2.

- Replace lightThemes/darkThemes arrays with themeCombos in daisyuiThemes.js
- Simplify useDarkMode hook: combo selection instead of independent per-mode
- Convert ThemeSelector from dropdown to inline button group (2 buttons)
- Update MenuThemeSection in MobileLayout for combo list
- Delete unused ThemeList.jsx component
- Update index.html flash prevention script for combo-based lookup
- Update generate-theme-meta.mjs for combo structure
- Reduce DaisyUI themes in index.css from 16 to 4 (lofi, black, fantasy, luxury)
- localStorage keys: darkMode (bool) + themeCombo (id), replacing lightTheme/darkTheme

Tags: ui, themes, daisyui, simplification
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-combos
Semver: minor
